name: Hunyuan3D-2mv
description: Multi-view image-to-3D mesh generation using Tencent Hunyuan3D-2mv. Accepts front, left, back and right view images to reconstruct a detailed untextured mesh. Only the front view is required.
author: Lightning Pixel

params_schema.label: Model Variant
params_schema.tooltip: Turbo is a distilled model roughly 2x faster. Standard gives slightly better geometry.

params_schema.label: Inference Steps
params_schema.tooltip: Number of diffusion steps. More steps = better quality but slower.

params_schema.label: Mesh Resolution
params_schema.tooltip: Octree resolution controls mesh detail. Higher values need more VRAM.

params_schema.label: Left View Image (optional)
params_schema.tooltip: Optional left-side view image to improve geometry reconstruction.

params_schema.label: Back View Image (optional)
params_schema.tooltip: Optional back view image to improve geometry reconstruction.

params_schema.label: Right View Image (optional)
params_schema.tooltip: Optional right-side view image to improve geometry reconstruction.

params_schema.label: Seed
params_schema.tooltip: Change the seed if the result is unsatisfying.
